item.title: Signal Intercept: Sector 7
item.description: Unusual frequency spikes detected in the lower quadrants. Recommend immediate investigation.

item.title: Hardware Update: GFEngine v2.1
item.description: The latest core update improves offline resilience and CORS proxy routing.
